description: When SoG drops below 0.3 kt for 10 minutes while mode=underway, log a logbook prompt to set the new mode (anchored/moored/docked). Does NOT auto-change mode — arrival type is ambiguous from SoG alone (could be anchor, mooring, slip, drifting).

data.name: Defiant
data.message: stopped (SoG < 0.3 kt for 10 min) while mode=underway — please update mode (anchored/moored/docked)
